valueSection.title: Coding that grows with you
valueSection.subtitle: Echocode.app is looking for an ambitious Trainee iOS Developer ready to ditch "code for the sake of code" in favor of building profit-generating products. We work in the mobile app niche for the global market, so millions will see your code.

section01.title: What will you be working on?

val01.title: Real-world Experience:
val01.desc: Working on live products, not academic or dummy tasks.

val02.title: Mentorship:
val02.desc: Direct access to Senior engineers who will help you grow to Junior in months.

val03.title: Product Mindset:
val03.desc: We will teach you to understand metrics, Retention, and monetization.

val04.title: Full Remote ＆ Flexibility:
val04.desc: Work from wherever you are, result is what matters.

val01.title: Swift ＆ OOP Fundamentals
val01.desc: Basic proficiency in Swift and understanding of OOP principles.

val02.title: UIKit Knowledge (SwiftUI Plus)
val02.desc: Knowledge of UIKit basics (SwiftUI is a big plus).

val03.title: Mobile App Architecture Basics
val03.desc: Understanding of how a mobile app works (View lifecycle, API interaction).

val04.title: Product Mindset
val04.desc: Desire to understand "why" we build a feature, not just "how" to code it.

step01.title: Step 01
step01.subTitle: Review (CV ＆ GitHub)
step01.desc: Evaluating your experience, stack, and code quality for perfect role alignment.

step02.title: Step 02
step02.subTitle: Test Task
step02.desc: A practical challenge designed to showcase your logic, problem-solving skills, and architectural thinking.

step03.title: Step 03
step03.subTitle: Technical Interview
step03.desc: A deep dive into your expertise, decisions, and experience with systems.

step04.title: Step 04
step04.subTitle: Offer
step04.desc: Finalizing terms and presenting a clear, transparent proposal for our future collaboration.
